name: recordExperiment
description: Record an analysis run so it can be reproduced or audited later

name.description: Short human-readable name for the run

datasetId.description: Identifier of the dataset the analysis ran over

parameters.description: Parameter map — keys are parameter names, values are strings, numbers, or booleans

metrics.description: Result metrics — keys are metric names, values are numeric

notes.description: Free-form notes — caveats, deviations from the plan, or follow-ups

name: reportFindings
description: Report the outcome of a completed analysis back to the requesting agent or unit

summary.description: Plain-language summary of the findings, including effect size and practical significance

caveats.description: Caveats and open questions that the consumer needs to know about before acting

followUps.description: Suggested follow-up analyses that would tighten the conclusion
